text:
There was a boy named Timmy who always wore a big silly hat. People thought it was ridiculous at first. But Timmy discovered that he could make them laugh. He’d leap out from behind a tree and yell, “Guess what! I’m a platypus!”

People would howl with laughter. Timmy danced around, his silly hat spinning. His laughter was infectious. Soon everyone was humming his silly platypus song.

Timmy saved up his jokes. One rainy afternoon, a very posh lady with tweed skirts visited his small town. The lady had a sharp tongue, especially about things she didn't understand.

“Who wears a hat like that? What is it you think you’re doing?” she scolded.

Timmy stood proudly, holding up his ridiculous hat.

“Well,” she snapped. “That’s just ridiculous. Where did you get it?”

“Avery’s Oddities,” Timmy said. “It helps me think!”

She scoffed. “
